{{Quote|Glory to the Empire! We are victorious!|Unidentified Imperial comm officer|<ref name="X-wing" />}}
The '''battle near the Blair Cluster''' was a battle of [[Task Force Vengeance]] during its operation in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces used the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'' to pull [[Airam (group)|Airam]] freighters out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] along a known [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], then proceeded to disable the craft and take their crew and passengers into custody.

==The Background==
In pursuit of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces into the then-neutral [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]], Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] and its auxiliary cruiser, the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'', set up an ambush near an oft-traveled hyperspace transit point at the edge of the [[Blair Cluster/Legends|Blair Cluster]]. The plan was to have ''Compellor'' use its [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] to draw out of hyperspace and trap all ships attempting to pass through the area. The attached [[Avenger Squadron]] in its shielded [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] would then force their surrender following which [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] belonging to Sigma Squadron would deliver [[Stormtrooper/Legends|boarding parties]] to inspect them. Wanted criminals would be arrested and illegal cargoes seized. Wherever warranted, the Imperials meant to obtain prisoners for interrogation. [[Capital ship/Legends|Capital ship]] defense was to be supplied by Beta and Gamma Squadrons in their [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].

==The Battle==
Minutes into the operation, the Airam [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|shuttle]] ''[[Ellichon]]'' was dragged into [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]]. At first it sought to evade surrender by running for the asteroid field in hopes of hiding, but Avenger Squadron's warning shots halted it. Likewise, the ''[[Squit]]'', a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 freighter]], and the [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transport]] [[Redeye (starship)|''Redeye'']] tried flight before cooperation. The operation became more complicated, however, when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|medium transport]] [[Gilder (GR-75 medium transport)|''Gilder'']] arrived with its [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] escort. After a brief skirmish, during which the Rebel starfighters were shot down by the Imperial TIEs and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], it too surrendered.

Quick on the heels of the Imperials' first minor triumph came the Airam [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class cruiser]] ''[[Anat]]'' and its two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] escorts, ''[[Grom 1]]'' and ''[[Grom 2]]''. Defiant even in the face of overwhelming firepower and determined to defend their territory against the intruders, ''Anat''{{'s}} commanders ordered the launch of their [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wing]] and [[R-41 Starchaser|R-41]] squadrons, [[Spike Squadron|Spike]] and [[Mallet Squadron|Mallet]]. Spike Squadron was to engage the Empire's fighters while Mallet torpedoed ''Compellor'' in an attempt to drive it away.

The Imperial response was fast, with ''Rage'' ordering Beta Squadron to first destroy the corvettes and then the ''Dreadnaught''. Avenger and Gamma Squadrons covered them, wiping out the Airam starfighters. The Airam capital ships were felled by Beta's torpedoes and concentrated fire from ''Rage''. With all opposition vanquished, Sigma Squadron was successful in finishing their boarding tasks. The Empire had won the day.

==Aftermath==
The Imperials' inspections found every one of the stopped vessels to have aboard either wanted criminals, illicit cargoes, or both. This discovery, combined with the brash attack by the Airam ''Dreadnaught'', confirmed in their minds that their campaign was long overdue. Retaliation was agreed upon, its form and location depending on the knowledge gleaned from their new prisoners.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
